query:
-- Fix the 11 ChannelHaus services where monthlyRevenue was incorrectly set to the wholesale cost
-- These customers don't have Xero invoices imported yet - revenue is unknown
-- Set monthlyRevenue = 0 and flag for Xero import

UPDATE services
SET 
  monthlyRevenue = 0.00,
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''),
    ' | [REVENUE UNKNOWN] monthlyRevenue was incorrectly set to ChannelHaus wholesale cost. No Xero invoice imported for this customer. Import Xero invoice to establish retail revenue.'
  )
WHERE supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND monthlyCost = monthlyRevenue
  AND monthlyCost > 0;

-- Verify the fix
SELECT 
  planName,
  customerName,
  monthlyCost,
  monthlyRevenue,
  CASE WHEN monthlyRevenue = 0 THEN 'FIXED - Revenue unknown' ELSE 'Still broken' END as status
FROM services
WHERE supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND (monthlyCost = monthlyRevenue OR monthlyRevenue = 0)
  AND monthlyCost > 0
  AND discoveryNotes LIKE '%REVENUE UNKNOWN%'
ORDER BY customerName;
